creator: pirzyk@FreeBSD.org
text:
When using the rkhunter port as usual, one updates the mirror.dat to get new signatures.  Once this update has been done, the 'pkg_info -g' report the checksum mismatch:

pkg_info -g rkhunter-1.4.0
Information for rkhunter-1.4.0:

Mismatched Checksums:
/usr/local/var/lib/rkhunter/db/mirrors.dat fails the original MD5 checksum

How-To-Repeat: See above
